name: Justin Rodriguez- Chicago Mortgage Loan Officer with Neighborhood Loans
description_short: Justin Rodriguez is a Senior Mortgage Loan Officer at Neighborhood Loans in Chicago offering home purchase, refinance, and specialty mortgage products including FHA, VA, and jumbo loans.
description_long:
Justin Rodriguez operates as a Senior Mortgage Loan Officer with Neighborhood Loans, a mortgage lender serving the Chicago area. Rodriguez emphasizes a mission-driven approach to mortgage lending, stating that he entered the industry to help families achieve homeownership and build financial stability through property ownership. His professional credentials include NMLS #1967485 and he maintains two contact phone lines (773.425.2373 and 630.757.4143) to serve clients across the Chicago metropolitan region.

The company offers a comprehensive range of mortgage products designed to serve different borrower profiles and financial situations. Their portfolio includes conventional mortgages, FHA loans, VA loans, FHA Streamline refinances, adjustable-rate mortgages (ARMs), and jumbo loans for high-value properties. Beyond origination, Neighborhood Loans provides mortgage servicing and insurance products. The company features an online mortgage calculator to help prospective borrowers estimate monthly payments including principal, interest, taxes, insurance, PMI, and HOA dues.

Neighborhood Loans distinguishes itself through a stated five-step process emphasizing rapid pre-approval (within 24 hours), transparent communication, and dedicated loan processing support. Rodriguez's profile highlights the company's core values of growth mindset, transparency, compassionate service, integrity, and process-driven operations. The website emphasizes relationship-building and personalized service, with Rodriguez positioning himself as available to answer questions throughout the entire loan lifecycle from application through closing.

Prospective borrowers should note that while the website provides service overview and process transparency, specific interest rates, fees, loan terms, and approval criteria are not disclosed online. The company's review section appears incomplete on the visible portions of the website. Rodriguez's experience level and track record of closed loans are not detailed, though his senior title suggests established experience in the field.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fast pre-approval timeline (within 24 hours of online application)
Wide product range including FHA, VA, conventional, ARM, FHA Streamline, and jumbo loans
Dual contact phone numbers for broader service coverage in Chicago metropolitan area
Dedicated loan processor support described as link between borrower and underwriter
Online mortgage payment calculator with customizable options (taxes, insurance, PMI, HOA)
Transparent five-step process outlined clearly on website
NMLS-licensed loan officer (NMLS #1967485) with stated commitment to relationship-building
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or specific loan terms publicly listed on website
No fee schedule or cost transparency provided
Limited client reviews visible on the website (review section incomplete)
No information about loan officer experience, loan volume, or customer satisfaction metrics
Geographic service area not explicitly defined beyond Chicago reference
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking pre-approval and guidance through the purchase process
Military veterans and active-duty personnel eligible for VA loans
Borrowers seeking FHA loans with lower down payment requirements
diagnosis: Justin Rodriguez at Neighborhood Loans is best suited for Chicago-area borrowers seeking residential mortgages with emphasis on transparent communication and relationship-based service. The primary caveat is that critical pricing information (interest rates, fees, APRs) is not available online, requiring direct contact with Rodriguez to compare loan costs against competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 4327 W Irving Park Rd #1B, Chicago, IL 60641
